heading: Key Features Tailored for Success
description: Explore Bicycle's powerful features designed to enhance operational efficiency and drive growth. From seamless integrations to real-time analytics, each tool transforms data into actionable insights, empowering businesses to make informed decisions and boost performance.

feature.title: 1-click data onboarding
feature.description: Ingest data seamlessly with hundreds of integrations. Bicycle’s LLM-powered engine auto-discovers relationships using built-in industry context.

screenshot.title: Data Onboarding Screenshot
screenshot.description: A preview showing seamless data onboarding with Bicycle.

feature.title: Use-case Sharing
feature.description: Easily share tailored use-case configurations across teams for faster deployment.

screenshot.title: Use-case Sharing Screenshot
screenshot.description: An example of how teams can collaborate on use-case sharing.

feature.title: Business Insights for All
feature.description: Deliver actionable insights to stakeholders across all levels of the organization.

screenshot.title: Insights Dashboard Screenshot
screenshot.description: A visual representation of key business insights.

feature.title: Pre-built Connectors
feature.description: Access pre-built connectors for a wide range of third-party tools.

screenshot.title: Integration Connectors Screenshot
screenshot.description: A demonstration of available pre-built connectors.

feature.title: Custom Integration Options
feature.description: Leverage APIs for building custom integrations suited to unique workflows.

screenshot.title: Custom Integration Screenshot
screenshot.description: How custom workflows are created with API support.

feature.title: Continuous Sync
feature.description: Keep your data synchronized in real time across platforms.

screenshot.title: Syncing in Action Screenshot
screenshot.description: An overview of real-time syncing capabilities.

feature.title: Predictive Analytics
feature.description: Utilize predictive models to anticipate trends and make proactive decisions.

screenshot.title: Predictive Analytics Screenshot
screenshot.description: Visualizations of trends and predictive insights.

feature.title: Customizable Dashboards
feature.description: Design dashboards that fit your business needs and preferences.

feature.title: Real-time Alerts
feature.description: Receive instant alerts for key metrics and anomalies.

screenshot.title: Real-time Alerts Screenshot
screenshot.description: An example of real-time alerting in action.
